implemented: Cost: Exile this card from your graveyard (73 cards)
Cost: Return land to hand (14 cards)
Cost: Reveal this card from hand (10 cards)
Cost: Exile top of library (5 cards)
Cost: Ability-word prefixes (Cohort, Boast, Metalcraft, Exhaust, Renew, Delirium, etc.)

categories.remaining_fixable: Remaining patterns are highly fragmented (1-7 cards each per unique pattern). The 725 remaining Standard cards require ~200+ distinct parser patterns.

targets.note: Targets require implementing hundreds of unique low-count patterns. Each additional percent requires exponentially more parser work as the remaining gaps are highly fragmented.
